step0.text: Hi! I'm Clippy. Let's explore Carlos' portfolio! Double-click the My PC icon on the desktop to read the About Me section.

step1.text:
Great! You opened My PC. Here you can read about Carlos.

Next, let's see his work! Open the Projects Gallery from the Start Menu.

step2.text:
Great, have look at all these projects! Carlos has built a Lamguage, Keyboards, and Operatingsystems.

Now you're ready to explore on your own. Have fun!
